history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up shot of a young person with messy brown hair and a nose ring, wearing a black hoodie with the hood pulled up. Their eyes are looking directly at the camera. The background is a white wall with graffiti. The graffiti is in black and appears to be stylized lettering, with some red accents, possibly a dripping heart. The lighting is dim and creates a moody atmosphere. The overall color palette consists of blacks, whites, grays, and a touch of red from the graffiti. The mood is somewhat edgy and introspective.
